title: coreopsis hirta
intro: Coreopsis hirta, also known as the hairy coreopsis or rough coreopsis, is a perennial wildflower native to North America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of coreopsis hirta typically involve infusions of the flowers and leaves, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, and salves for topical application.
